seo.title: Salto Trampolino | Bungee trampoline and inflatable castles in Switzerland
seo.description: Bungee trampoline, inflatable castles and children's attractions for private and public events across Switzerland. Contact us for information and availability.
seo.ogDescription: Professional, colorful and dynamic attractions for parties and events across Switzerland.

hero.eyebrow: Attractions for parties and events across Switzerland
hero.title: Jump higher. Have fun with care.
hero.subtitle: Bungee trampoline and inflatable castles for parties, events and unforgettable moments throughout Switzerland.

about.title: Fun that comes to your event
paragraphs: Salto Trampolino brings energy, movement and smiles to private and public events across Switzerland. We offer bungee trampoline, inflatable castles and children's attractions with professional structures and dedicated staff.
Whether it is a birthday party, corporate event, public celebration or family day, we can help create a joyful, active and memorable experience.

services.title: Our attractions
services.subtitle: Flexible solutions for parties, events and outdoor days.

items.title: Bungee Trampoline
items.shortText: Elastic-assisted jumps for a real flying feeling.
items.longText: The bungee trampoline lets children, teenagers and adults jump with elastic support, reaching exciting heights while enjoying a dynamic and controlled experience.
highlights: For users from about 15 to 85 kg

items.title: Inflatable castles
items.shortText: Colorful, soft and perfect for children to play with care.
items.longText: Inflatable castles are ideal for children aged about 3 to 12. They offer slides, large play areas and soft walls, creating a cheerful space for private parties, corporate events and outdoor gatherings.

items.title: Equipment and operator for events
items.shortText: We bring the attraction and the staff needed to manage it.
items.longText: For private, public or corporate events we can provide both the equipment and a dedicated person to manage the attraction, making the organization easier and the experience smoother.

events.title: For every special occasion
events.subtitle: Our attractions bring movement, color and fun to many kinds of events.

coverage.title: Operating across Switzerland
coverage.text: Locations and times may vary depending on season, events and requests. Contact us to check availability, installation possibilities and solutions for your event.

safety.title: Fun with attention to safety
safety.text: Safety is central to every installation. We use professional structures, carry out regular checks and pay attention to responsible attraction management during use.
points: Experience for children, teenagers and families
safety.note: Conditions of use may vary according to the attraction, place, weather and event type.

gallery.title: Moments of energy, smiles and freedom
gallery.subtitle: From summer days to snowy events, our attractions bring fun to different settings across Switzerland.

items.question: Do you operate across Switzerland?
items.answer: Yes. We can organize our attractions in different Swiss locations depending on season, availability and event characteristics.

items.question: Are prices shown on the website?
items.answer: No. Every event can have different needs, so we prepare information and estimates on request.

items.question: Can I request equipment for a private party?
items.answer: Yes. Our attractions can be requested for private parties, birthdays, corporate events, public events and other occasions.

items.question: Do you also provide an operator?
items.answer: Yes. On request we can provide a dedicated person to manage the attraction during the event.

items.question: Is bungee trampoline suitable for children?
items.answer: Yes, it is designed for children, teenagers and adults, respecting weight limits and conditions of use.

items.question: What are the weight limits?
items.answer: As an indication, the attraction is suitable for users from about 15 to 85 kg. Final conditions are assessed according to the situation and installed attraction.

items.question: What ages are inflatable castles for?
items.answer: Generally they are suitable for children aged 3 to 12, but suitability can vary by structure and event.

items.question: What happens in bad weather?
items.answer: If weather conditions are not suitable, attraction availability and use are assessed together. Contact us to agree on the best solution.

items.question: How early should I contact you?
items.answer: We recommend contacting us as early as possible, especially for events, private parties or busy periods.

items.question: How can I request information?
items.answer: You can call us, write on WhatsApp, send an email or fill in the contact form.

contact.title: Let's organize your next event together
contact.subtitle: Tell us what kind of event you are preparing, where it will take place and the approximate period. We will reply with the most suitable information.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We will reply as soon as possible.
form.error: Something went wrong while sending. Please try again or contact us directly by email or WhatsApp.
